name: solidity-audit
description: Solidity development standards and security auditing. TRIGGER when: working with .sol files, foundry.toml, hardhat.config.*, smart contract auditing, security review, or vulnerability analysis. Covers Foundry-first development patterns, vulnerability taxonomies, and audit methodology. DO NOT TRIGGER when: general Ethereum tooling/ecosystem questions (use ethskills skill), or Noir/ZK circuits (use noir skill).
